faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in East Meadow?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in East Meadow typically ranges from $800 to $4,000 depending on the size of your property, extent of infestation, and treatment method required. A standard 2,000 square foot home averages $1,500–$2,500 for liquid barrier treatment, while severe infestations or larger properties may require more extensive treatment reaching $4,000.

faqs.question: What types of termites are common in East Meadow, NY?
faqs.answer: East Meadow primarily deals with Eastern Subterranean Termites, the most destructive species in Long Island. These termites live in underground colonies and build mud tubes to access wood in your home's foundation, framing, and structural components. Occasionally, drywood termites are also found in Nassau County properties.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in East Meadow homes?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in East Meadow are completed in 4–8 hours for an average-sized home. Liquid barrier treatments require trenching around the foundation perimeter, while baiting systems involve installing monitoring stations around your property. Follow-up inspections are scheduled 30–90 days after initial treatment to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite inspections before treatment in East Meadow?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide free termite inspections for all East Meadow properties. Our certified inspectors examine your foundation, basement, crawl spaces, attic, and other vulnerable areas using moisture meters and thermal imaging to detect hidden infestations. You'll receive a detailed report with treatment recommendations and a transparent price quote before any work begins.
